## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 17, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Dario_, Jul 17, 2026, 2/5: "It is too clear that since the paid version has existed, the free version has suffered from a lot of bugs and slowdowns. Lately, for example, when I play audio and close the app the edit bar remains open and the only solution is to force stop Telegram. Also when I try to close the app, it shrinks to a little window but doesn't actually close. You have to repeat the operation many times until it actually closes. In short, bugs not worthy of an app of this level."

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      3 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jun 17, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Ninja Dragon_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "When I deleted and reinstalled the app, they told me I had to pay to access my account."
            2. _Wim Blonk_, Jul 11, 2026, 1/5: "login doesn't work anymore. email code received and then they want to send SMS code but this code is not send. why? leave it as it was. trying to get paid for a service they do not deliver?"
            3. _Jahmil Ansoe_, Jun 17, 2026, 1/5: "I can't log in and it says I have an existing account but I can't access it to delete it"
